title: Lemon Lime Orange Juice Squeezer Manual Citrus Press - Aluminum Alloy Mexican Elbow – Easy to Use - by Mobi Lock
features: 🍋 Easy Peasy Lemon Squeezy – Juicing lemons or limes with an old-fashioned citrus reamer is messy and tiring. Mobi Lock key lime juicer is effortless to use. It’s amazingly satisfying when you squeeze out every last drop of juice with this handheld citrus presser. You can keep juicing the hard way or use the citrus press to freshen up your life!

🍹 Fresh Juice No Pits – There is nothing like adding a squeeze of fresh zesty lime juice to cocktails, desserts or main dishes. Every professional chef keeps a single press lemon squeezer handy, so they can add a signature flavor to their dishes. Use our manual citrus presser to season your food like the experts with NO mess and NO pits!

🌟 Premium Double Bowl Design – You know the best manual citrus juice press when you see it! Our lemon squeezer is designed with two bowls to squeeze both large and small citrus fruits. Use for small oranges, Meyer lemons, limequats, Mexican limes, Rangpur or Tahiti limes. The second bowl also doubles as a filter for the rind, pulp, and pits.

✅ Dishwasher Safe – The aluminum alloy yellow lemon juicer is corrosion and rust-resistant. Easily rinse off with warm soapy water or place in the dishwasher. Your culinary skills will drastically improve, once you start using this Lemon Lime Squeezer in your kitchen! Our aluminum alloy zester also makes a great gift for foodie friends in your life.

👉 Satisfaction Guaranteed – Our manual lemon squeezer is made with aluminum alloy and non-toxic lead-free coating, and comes with a 90-day FULL REFUND. We think it’s time to make yourself a refreshing glass of cold lemonade!
description: Product Description When Life Gives You Lemons, Get Zesty! Homemade meals are always delicious especially when they are made with the freshest ingredients! Like pro chefs who would never use anything but the purest flavors, you can easily do the same with this lemon squeezer press! Hello, Fresh Recipes! If you’re feeling uninspired in the kitchen, we promise that things will get hot and zesty once you start using the lemon press juicer. Try some lime glazed shrimp, lemon/lime guacamole or a glass of Bombay Fizz. Use the recipe ebook for even more juicy ideas! Effortless Juicing Bartenders, home cooks, amateur chefs or even kids can get ALL that delicious juice out of their citrus fruits with ease. Juicy, fresh lemons and limes will become a staple in your drinks, desserts or main dishes! Squeeze the two handles together using one hand or two. Ergonomic Design You should not feel any discomfort when using this citrus presser. The two handles can be easily pressed together to extract every drop of juice. Even kids can have a turn at juicing. Features & Specifications Stainless Steel Double Bowl Design Two sizes for juicing a variety of citrus fruits. The second bowl also doubles as a strainer or filter for ensuring no seeds, rind or pits slip into your food. Extremely durable, rust and corrosion resistant. This sturdy lemon juicer will last for years of citrus pressing at home or on your travels. Bright Fresh Design Inspired by the bright green color of limes, and sunshine yellow of fresh lemons, this handy tool will brighten up your kitchen. It can be hung up on a hook or placed in a drawer. The bright colors are 100% non – toxic certified lead-free paint that will not chip or scrub off. (Additionally, the Mobi Lock Lemon Squeezer is dishwasher-safe. However, we recommend hand washing to ensure a longer lifespan, as certain dishwashing liquids may cause corrosion of metal and aluminum alloys.) Natural Flavors Instead of using preserved juices that just don’t have the same effect, use this lemon squeezer as you cook to add a touch of sharp, sour, or tangy flavors to your food. How to Use the Lemon Squeezer FRUIT SELECTION 1.) Feel the firmness of the fruit. Select a fresh, ripe fruit. Choose a fruit that’s slightly (and evenly) soft, but not mushy. Avoid juicing a fruit that feels hard. • The harder the fruit, the more difficult it will be to juice. • The heavier the fruit feels, the juicier it will be! • The best citrus fruit has a rind free of blemishes, and a bold, sweet scent. PLACE LEMON/LIME PROPERLY 2.) Cut the fruit with a large chef’s knife. • Make the cut a bit off-center. Cut the fruit crosswise, then slice off pointy tip of the rind (if applicable). • Cutting off the rind tip will give you more leverage for using a manual squeezer. 3.) Place the fruit into the squeezer. • Make sure to place the cut side of the fruit down, facing the holes. The interior dome of the squeezer should press towards the rind-end of the fruit. However, if you leave the cut side facing up, the juice will squirt upwards! SQUEEZE AWAY! 4.) Bring the handles together. • Hold the squeezer over a bowl. Press the handles until the handles are close enough together that you can grip them with both hands. 5.) Squeeze the handles. • Place one hand in front of the other. Grip the handles of the squeezer with both hands at the same time. Squeeze several times, until juice stops flowing from the squeezer. If you know exactly how much fruit you need to juice, you can skip the separate container and squeeze directly into a pot or other cookware.
